name: Critters: A New Binge
overview: Pursued by intergalactic bounty hunters, the Critters return to Earth on a secret mission and encounter lovelorn high-schooler Christopher, his crush Dana, his best friend Charlie, and his mom Veronica, whose past will come back to bite them—literally.

trailers.title: Critters: A New Binge - Official Trailer [HD] | A Shudder Exclusive Series
